description: Create a front elevation drawing of a trade show display booth in LibreCAD using millimeters. The drawing must include a 'FRAME' layer (Color: White/Black/7) with a 3000x2500 outer frame starting at (0,0), a 3000x400 header panel at (0,2100), and two 200x2100 side vertical panels at (0,0) and (2800,0). On a 'SHELVES' layer (Color: Green), include two horizontal shelf lines from x=200 to x=2800 at y=700 and y=1400. Add the text 'ACME DISPLAYS' (height 150) centered in the header panel on a 'TEXT' layer (Color: Cyan). Include a 'DIMENSIONS' layer (Color: Red) with linear dimensions for the total width (3000) and total height (2500). Save the drawing to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/booth_elevation.dxf.
